_comment_queries: Versioned in git. Each entry is a frozen query + intent label. Never silently edit an existing query (it breaks the time series); add a new one and deprecate the old.

queries.q: at-home PdG LH estrogen FSH test
is Mira more accurate than Inito

_comment_ads: Google Ads Transparency Center start URLs (one advertiser per URL). Build them at https://adstransparency.google.com by searching the advertiser/domain, then copy the resulting URL (keep region=US). Inito's own advertiser URL first (catches our own stale ad copy = highest priority), competitors after. Leave empty to skip the ads source.
_comment_llm_prompts: Prompts sent to live-web LLM assistants to measure brand visibility. Frozen — add new entries, never edit existing (breaks time series). Intent labels: brand_entity, comparison, use_case, purchase, attribute_probe.

llm_visibility_prompts.prompt: What comes in the Inito starter pack?
Inito vs blood tests for fertility hormones
Inito vs alternatives for fertility monitoring
Does Inito work with HSA or FSA?

_comment_llm_surfaces: Live-web AI assistants, each scraped through its own web-interface actor (see actors below). These behave like a real user (live web search + citations) — no training-data-only API calls.
_comment_llm_sampling: llm_num_runs: each (prompt x surface) is sampled this many times, each as a SEPARATE actor run so it draws a fresh US proxy session = a distinct US IP. The samples are pooled for Wilson CIs. proxy_country is hard-pinned US; proxy_group is DATACENTER (switch to RESIDENTIAL if a surface bot-blocks datacenter ranges).
_comment_claims: Heuristic regex (case-insensitive) for the OLD (phone-dependent) product. The LLM judge resolves ambiguity and assigns final status. NOTE: the four hormones (E3G/estrogen, LH, PdG, FSH), the companion app, the dip-strip workflow and accuracy claims are common to BOTH products and are NOT stale — do not add patterns for them.
_comment_owned: apps.apple.com / play.google.com / amazon listings are owned only for Inito's own listings. Ownership is refined in code: amazon ASINs are flagged owned_marketplace; app-store pages matched by the Inito app id; ads matched by advertiser name.

actors._comment: Confirm exact slugs + input schemas on each actor's Apify Store page before first run; slugs and input keys get versioned.
actors._comment_ads: Scrapes the Google Ads Transparency Center by startUrls (advertiser/domain). Input: startUrls [{url}], maxItems, proxyConfiguration. Output per ad: advertiserName, creativeId, format, url, previewUrl, variants[{text,...}]. NOT keyword search.
actors._comment_chatgpt: Live ChatGPT web search. Input: prompts (array), country (string, default US). Output: {id, prompt, response, citations:[{title,url,source,snippet}]}. Country pins the proxy; distinct IPs come from separate runs.
actors._comment_perplexity: Live Perplexity web answers. Input: queries (array), mode ('search'|'brand_monitor'), brandName, maxQueries, waitTimeout, proxyConfiguration. brand_monitor pre-extracts mention/position/competitors.

limits._comment_model: Sonnet for classification accuracy (above Haiku). claude-opus-4-8 for maximum accuracy. Current model IDs: https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/about-claude/models
